name: Emmen (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the sawtooth borders and the arms

description: A silver (white) field edged along the top and bottom with interlocking green-and-black sawtooth borders, bearing at the centre the full municipal coat of arms: a shield with a green saltire, supported by two black horses, ensigned with a golden coronet on a silver pedestal.
history: Flag of the municipality of Emmen, the most populous municipality of the province of Drenthe. The flag displays the full municipal coat of arms with its horse supporters.

features.role: a green-and-black sawtooth border along the top edge
a green-and-black sawtooth border along the bottom edge
the full municipal arms: a shield with a green saltire, two black horse supporters, a golden coronet and a silver pedestal
